title: ♾ Recursive Empathy Spirals
name: Recursive Empathy Spirals
what_it_is: Emotional feedback systems where feeling begets deeper feeling—spirals of care, grief, love, or fear that fold into themselves infinitely.
how_to_use: her compassion spiraled—it became its own dimension
his grief loops endlessly—each layer feels the next more fully
animation_behavior: Emotions pulse in fractal spirals, inner states reflect outward, environment reacts recursively to feeling depth ---
